description: Demonstrates all supported field types and Smart components for platform capability evaluation.
semantic_description: Comprehensive field type showcase demonstrating all supported dataTypes (string, decimal, enum, reference, file, richtext), components (userselect, colorpicker, moneyinput, aifield), workflow status, and time-based tracking. Primary entity for platform capability evaluation and component rendering validation.

description: Child model of showcase_all_fields. One row per (showcase, month). Drives the MonthlyGrid detail block (parentModel = showcase_all_fields, parentField = pid, childModel = sc_monthly_metric, childParentField = sc_showcase_pid, monthField = sc_month).
semantic_description: Monthly aggregated metrics for a showcase record: revenue, cost, unit volume, and remarks by calendar month (1-12). Child model enabling MonthlyGrid detail block with month-based pivoting.
lifecycle_description: No independent lifecycle — inherits parent showcase_all_fields status. One-per-month record per parent.
